title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Texas Instruments India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Texas Instruments India
jsonLd.description:
Texas Instruments India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Madurai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Texas Instruments India:
Texas Instruments India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Texas Instruments India!
